case_title: AGPM 861 SUTTER LP VS. IHIPONG SINGHANATE ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGPM 861 SUTTER LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SINGHANATE, IHIPONG PACE, MARIO ROGERS, ANDRE CINNELLA, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 861 SUTTER STREET, UNIT #601, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109 $3,498.46 RENT, $855.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,353.46, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
